ja_html: どこまでも<ruby><rb>続</rb><rt>つづ</rt></ruby>くような<ruby><rb>青</rb><rt>あお</rt></ruby>の<ruby><rb>季節</rb><rt>きせつ</rt></ruby>は
zh_text: 似乎無限延續的青春季節
en_text: In the season of blue that seemed to go on forever

ja_html: <ruby><rb>四</rb><rt>よっ</rt></ruby>つ<ruby><rb>並</rb><rt>なら</rt></ruby>ぶ<ruby><rb>眼</rb><rt>まなこ</rt></ruby>の<ruby><rb>前</rb><rt>まえ</rt></ruby>を<ruby><rb>遮</rb><rt>さえぎ</rt></ruby>るものは<ruby><rb>何</rb><rt>なに</rt></ruby>もない
zh_text: 並列的兩雙眼前沒有任何遮擋
en_text: Nothing obstructed the view of the four lined eyes

ja_html: アスファルト、<ruby><rb>蝉時雨</rb><rt>せみしぐれ</rt></ruby>を<ruby><rb>反射</rb><rt>はんしゃ</rt></ruby>して
zh_text: 柏油路、反射著刺耳蟬聲
en_text: The asphalt ground was echoing the chorus of cicadas

ja_html: きみという<ruby><rb>沈黙</rb><rt>ちんもく</rt></ruby>が<ruby><rb>聞</rb><rt>き</rt></ruby>こえなくなる
zh_text: 變得聽不見名為你的沉默
en_text: It prevented me from hearing the silence of you

ja_html: この<ruby><rb>日々</rb><rt>ひび</rt></ruby>が<ruby><rb>色褪</rb><rt>いろあ</rt></ruby>せる
en_text: Those days faded away

ja_html: <ruby><rb>僕</rb><rt>ぼく</rt></ruby>と<ruby><rb>違</rb><rt>ちが</rt></ruby>うきみの<ruby><rb>匂</rb><rt>にお</rt></ruby>いを<ruby><rb>知</rb><rt>し</rt></ruby>ってしまっても
zh_text: 即使知曉你的氣息與我不同
en_text: Even after I got to know the smell of you, different from mine

ja_html: <ruby><rb>置</rb><rt>お</rt></ruby>き<ruby><rb>忘</rb><rt>わす</rt></ruby>れてきた<ruby><rb>永遠</rb><rt>えいえん</rt></ruby>の<ruby><rb>底</rb><rt>そこ</rt></ruby>に
en_text: In the depths of eternity that left behind

ja_html: <ruby><rb>今</rb><rt>いま</rt></ruby>でも<ruby><rb>青</rb><rt>あお</rt></ruby>が<ruby><rb>棲</rb><rt>す</rt></ruby>んでいる
en_text: Our blue still lives

ja_html: <ruby><rb>今</rb><rt>いま</rt></ruby>でも<ruby><rb>青</rb><rt>あお</rt></ruby>は<ruby><rb>澄</rb><rt>す</rt></ruby>んでいる
en_text: Our blue is still clear

ja_html: どんな<ruby><rb>祈</rb><rt>いの</rt></ruby>りも<ruby><rb>言葉</rb><rt>ことば</rt></ruby>も
en_text: No prayer or word could ever reach you

ja_html: <ruby><rb>近</rb><rt>ちか</rt></ruby>づけるのに、<ruby><rb>届</rb><rt>とど</rt></ruby>かなかった
zh_text: 明明如此親近、卻無法傳達
en_text: No matter how close they could get to you

ja_html: まるで、<ruby><rb>静</rb><rt>しず</rt></ruby>かな<ruby><rb>恋</rb><rt>こい</rt></ruby>のような
en_text: In such a color as if it were a silent love

ja_html: <ruby><rb>頬</rb><rt>ほほ</rt></ruby>を<ruby><rb>伝</rb><rt>つた</rt></ruby>った<ruby><rb>夏</rb><rt>なつ</rt></ruby>のような<ruby><rb>色</rb><rt>いろ</rt></ruby>のなか
zh_text: 劃過臉頰的夏日色彩中
en_text: Or as if it were a summer rolling down a cheek

ja_html: きみを<ruby><rb>呪</rb><rt>のろ</rt></ruby>う<ruby><rb>言葉</rb><rt>ことば</rt></ruby>がずっと<ruby><rb>喉</rb><rt>のど</rt></ruby>の<ruby><rb>奥</rb><rt>おく</rt></ruby>につかえてる
zh_text: 詛咒你的話語一直如鯁在喉
en_text: I've got a curse word for you stuck in the back of my throat

ja_html: 「また<ruby><rb>会</rb><rt>あ</rt></ruby>えるよね」って、<ruby><rb>声</rb><rt>こえ</rt></ruby>にならない<ruby><rb>声</rb><rt>こえ</rt></ruby>
en_text: It is the unvoiced voice that says, "We'll see each other again, won't we?"

ja_html: <ruby><rb>昼下</rb><rt>ひるさ</rt></ruby>がり、じめつく<ruby><rb>風</rb><rt>かぜ</rt></ruby>の<ruby><rb>季節</rb><rt>きせつ</rt></ruby>は
en_text: In the season of damp winds, in the late afternoon

ja_html: <ruby><rb>想</rb><rt>おも</rt></ruby>い<ruby><rb>馳</rb><rt>は</rt></ruby>せる、まだ<ruby><rb>何者</rb><rt>なにもの</rt></ruby>でもなかった<ruby><rb>僕</rb><rt>ぼく</rt></ruby>らの<ruby><rb>肖像</rb><rt>しょうぞう</rt></ruby>
zh_text: 想法馳騁、還未有所成就的我們的肖像
en_text: I think of the image of us who were still nobody

ja_html: <ruby><rb>何</rb><rt>なに</rt></ruby>もかも<ruby><rb>分</rb><rt>わ</rt></ruby>かち<ruby><rb>合</rb><rt>あ</rt></ruby>えたはずだった
en_text: We could have shared everything

ja_html: あの<ruby><rb>日</rb><rt>ひ</rt></ruby>から<ruby><rb>少</rb><rt>すこ</rt></ruby>しずつ
en_text: Little by little since that day

ja_html: きみと<ruby><rb>違</rb><rt>ちが</rt></ruby>う<ruby><rb>僕</rb><rt>ぼく</rt></ruby>という<ruby><rb>呪</rb><rt>のろ</rt></ruby>いが<ruby><rb>肥</rb><rt>ふと</rt></ruby>っていく
zh_text: 名為我不同於你的詛咒逐漸肥大
en_text: The curse of me being different from you grew thicker

ja_html: きみの<ruby><rb>笑顔</rb><rt>えがお</rt></ruby>の<ruby><rb>奥</rb><rt>おく</rt></ruby>の<ruby><rb>憂</rb><rt>うれ</rt></ruby>いを
en_text: The sorrow behind your smile

ja_html: <ruby><rb>見落</rb><rt>みお</rt></ruby>としたこと、<ruby><rb>悔</rb><rt>く</rt></ruby>やみ<ruby><rb>尽</rb><rt>つ</rt></ruby>くして
en_text: All the way I've regretted missing it

ja_html: <ruby><rb>徒花</rb><rt>あだばな</rt></ruby>と<ruby><rb>咲</rb><rt>さ</rt></ruby>いて<ruby><rb>散</rb><rt>ち</rt></ruby>っていくきみに
zh_text: 與無實之花一起綻放凋謝的你
en_text: To you, who bloomed and fell away as a fruitless flower

ja_html: さよなら
en_text: Farewell

en_text: Our blue still lives

zh_text: 詛咒你的話語一直如鯁在喉
en_text: I've got a curse word for you stuck in the back of my throat

en_text: It is the unvoiced voice that says, "We'll see each other again, won't we?"

ja_html: <ruby><rb>無限</rb><rt>むげん</rt></ruby>に<ruby><rb>膨張</rb><rt>ぼうちょう</rt></ruby>する<ruby><rb>銀河</rb><rt>ぎんが</rt></ruby>の<ruby><rb>星</rb><rt>ほし</rt></ruby>の<ruby><rb>粒</rb><rt>つぶ</rt></ruby>のように

en_text: Like star grains in an infinitely expanding galaxy

en_text: Spilling through the gaps between my fingers
